summary: Full end-to-end backend + frontend testing of Go-Next Salon Queue app. Seeded admin login (admin@gonext.com / admin123) works; demo-salon business pre-exists. All 17 backend pytest tests pass (auth, public customer, owner queue, business settings). UI flows verified via Playwright: landing, login, dashboard stats/table, walk-in dialog, call-next, online toggle, settings save, and customer join -> ticket polling all functioning correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET is committed in backend/.env — acceptable for dev but should be rotated for production.
Cookie is set with secure=False which is fine for preview (HTTPS terminated at ingress) but verify in prod deployment pipeline.
db.businesses unique index on owner_user_id prevents an owner from having more than one business — documented behavior, but register flow will 500 if user exists without business; not hit in tests.
completed_today / cancelled_today stats use a regex-based date match on ISO string which works but an indexed date field would be more efficient at scale.
Public join endpoint exposes no rate limiting — consider adding basic throttling for production.
auth/me returns 401 console error on public landing for unauthenticated users — harmless but could be suppressed in AuthContext.
test_credentials: admin@gonext.com / admin123 (seeded on startup); demo business id: demo-salon
seed_data_creation: Walk-in and remote customers were created during testing (prefixed TEST_ / UI_). Some remain in the queue; not critical but main agent can run a cleanup if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py cover auth (cookie+bearer), register, public business/join/ticket, authed queue manage (list/walk-in/call-next/status/stats), and business settings (patch + is_online toggle). Playwright script covered landing, login redirect to dashboard, walk-in dialog, call-next, online toggle, settings save, and join->ticket polling.
